generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: "http://example.org/DTDFVocab#"
prefix base: "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"

instance TemperatureMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring data for system status"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values based on thermal models"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies or faults in the thermal system for safety"
]

instance UpdateModelParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updates thermal model parameters based on sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TemperatureRegulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control action to turn heatbed or fan on/off based on temperature thresholds",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of temperature sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureMonitoringInsight
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration via non-linear least squares optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateModelParametersAction
]

instance PredictiveThermalModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive thermal modeling using Model A and Model B for temperature prediction",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control for temperature regulation using predefined lower (LL) and upper (UL) limits",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureRegulationAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection for safety in the thermal system",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for real-time data transmission between sensors and DT components",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ParameterCalibrationService, PredictiveThermalModelingService, BangBangControlService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ScipyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library used for non-linear least squares solver for parameter calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance PythonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming language used for implementing thermal models and control logic",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveThermalModelingService, BangBangControlService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 2 parameters calibrated using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 4 parameters calibrated using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance DS18S20Sensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DS18S20Sensor1TemperatureData
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DS18S20Sensor2TemperatureData
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DS18S20Sensor3TemperatureData
]

instance DS18S20Sensor1TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor1
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor2
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance DS18S20Sensor1Temperature : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 Sensor 1",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DS18S20Sensor1TemperatureData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2Temperature : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 Sensor 2",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DS18S20Sensor2TemperatureData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3Temperature : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 Sensor 3",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DS18S20Sensor3TemperatureData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for managing sensors and actuators"
]

instance PCBComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuator control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance InsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container maintaining thermal environment"
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source code storage and version control"
]

instance PCBDesignTools : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB design software tools used for circuit development"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers to handle 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan actuated through Raspberry Pi GPIO"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system comprising styrofoam insulated container, heatbed, fan, DS18S20 sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply",
    base:contains InsulatedContainer, Heatbed, Fan, DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3, RaspberryPiController, PCBComponent, PowerSupply, GitHubRepository, PCBDesignTools
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the DT (e.g., heatbed activation/deactivation, fan control) are sent via RabbitMQ messages to the low-level driver, which executes them on the physical components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components include RabbitMQ server on Raspberry Pi, controller for control logic, low-level driver for hardware interaction, and simulation models; communication via RabbitMQ between PT and DT."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated through experimental temperature measurements; Model B better predicts thermal inertia; calibration minimizes residual error using Scipy; Assumption 1 (uniform temperature) tested via sensor data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) for communication between PT and DT components hosted on Raspberry Pi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B with RabbitMQ server, controller, and low-level driver running on the same device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol in low-level driver to prevent unsafe states; controller parameters (LL, UL) enforce temperature limits; MOSFETs and optocouplers isolate control signals from high-current components."
]
